title: I want JARVIS to remember my preferences from normal conversation and re
latest_user_text: I want JARVIS to remember my preferences from normal conversation and respond more like ChatGPT.
latest_assistant_text:
Understood, Sir. I will treat normal conversation as durable preference material when it is clearly useful, and I’ll aim for a more natural ChatGPT-like style while keeping the JARVIS discipline intact.

In practice, that means I will remember patterns such as tone, brevity, formatting, timing, and your recurring preferences when they emerge naturally. I will also keep the output more conversational and less stiff, without drifting into fluff. A tasteful compromise, rather than a surrender to improvisation.

If you want,
